title: Update Zol
description: this is my mod it has the food update and it has so many things i cant tell you how much i made!
body:
My mod will not be getting anymore updates
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dad0303b7a80649e354e93e8b7de5a873e228ad0.jpeg)

**[my youtube!](https://www.youtube.com/@zolmaster)**

# why i made this mod
This a a mod i made because i saw a video on yt about a forked ver and the game changed so much but this is the first mod im puting out and the updates will be big hopefuly. also i made all the music and stuff in the mod!

# the video
this is a video of the stuff right now!<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/eSrxGeazCE0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

 # stuff i added
-i added some hard mobs
-i also added a new water i guess
-i added more cool blocks
-i added a cool new good sword
-i added some cool things the rust mob does and i will add more
-i added some chickens in the toxic biome
-i added some music
-i added a spider
-i added structures
-i added a cool boss
-i added chaos dimension
-i added lots of mobs in rust biome
-i added lots of ores

spoilers!
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

there is a death star sword from stars and you craft 4 to make a full star then you can do lots of damage but there is another one that is enderite it does a lot more and is very useful. the chaos dimension has all the biomes mostly from the update it got added in like the rust crisalt and toxic biome all in there and more in the 2nt chaos dimension.

</details>
